title: malakos #3120
definition:
1) soft, soft to the touch
 2) metaph. in a bad sense
    2a) effeminate
        2a1) of a catamite
        2a2) of a boy kept for homosexual relations with a man
        2a3) of a male who submits his body to unnatural lewdness
        2a4) of a male prostitute
